name: sparky-url-extractor
description: URL extractor plugin for Sparky — crawls web pages and extracts clean markdown using Mozilla Readability. Preserves headings, links, code blocks, tables, and lists. Supports llms.txt, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, and BFS crawling.

options.label: Max crawl depth
options.description: How many link-hops deep to follow from the start URL

options.label: Max pages
options.description: Maximum number of pages to crawl per URL source

options.label: Page timeout (ms)
options.description: Timeout for fetching a single page

options.label: Respect robots.txt
options.description: Obey Disallow rules and Crawl-delay from robots.txt
